appDescription: App esooka ku ssimu okukola okuyita mu misomo gy’okuyiga Baibuli — okusoma, okufumiitiriza, n’okuwandiika eby’okuddamu nga bw’ogenda.
sampleDescription: Okuyiga Baibuli okw’ebitundu mwenda nga okunoonyereza ku kukyuka okwa nnamaddala kye kitegeeza – era lwaki kikulu.

licence.name: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 Enkola y'ensi yonna
freedoms: Gabana: koppa era oddemu okusaasaanya ebintu mu ngeri yonna oba mu nkola yonna
Adapt: remix, transform, era okuzimba ku material olw’ekigendererwa kyonna, wadde mu by’obusuubuzi
conditions: Attribution: olina okuwa credit esaanidde, okuwa link eri layisinsi, n’okulaga oba enkyukakyuka zakolebwa
ShareAlike: bw’oba okyusakyusa, okukyusa, oba okuzimba ku bintu, olina okugaba ebiweebwayo byo wansi wa layisinsi y’emu ne eyasooka
notices: Tolina kugoberera layisinsi ya bintu by’ebintu ebiri mu lujjudde oba ng’okukozesa kwo kukkirizibwa okujjako oba okukoma okukolebwa.
Tewali ggaranti eweebwa. Layisinsi eyinza obutakuwa lukusa lwonna olwetaagisa okukozesa gy’ogenderera.
Mu kutondawo app eno, omuwandiisi yakozesezza Claude, ChatGPT, ne Gemini okukola ‘vibe coding’ ennene. Okusalawo kwonna ku birimu, n’ebigambo ebisembayo buvunaanyizibwa bwa muwandiisi.
